rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF IRENE ATACHEFF
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Demurrer To Petitioner Anthony Signorini'S Will Contest To Petition For Probate Of Decedent'S October 11, 2001 Will
rulings.Rulings: Tentative Rulings on (1) Stalling's Demurrer to Signorini's Will Contest to Petition to Probate October 11, 2001 Will, and, (2) Stalling's Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings on Signorini's Petition for Probate of Decedent's March 10, 2007 Will. On September 17, 2010 Petitioner Rhonda Stallings filed a Petition to Probate the October 11, 2001 Will of Irene Atacheff. On November 15, 2010 Respondent Signorini filed a Will Contest to the Petition. Stallings' Demurrer to Signorini's Will Contest is sustained without leave to amend. Signorini has no standing to challenge the 2001 Will. (Estate of Reeves (1991) 233 Cal.App.3d 651, 658.) On August 6, 2010 Petitioner Signorini filed an Amended Petition to Probate Decedent's Will dated March 10, 2007. Stalling's Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings on Anthony Signorini's Petition for Probate of Decedent's March 10, 2007 Will is Granted. Signorini lacks standing as an interested person to Petition to administer decedent's estate. (Probate Code section 8000, Estate of Reeves (1991) 233 Cal.App.3d 651, 658.) The Court makes the following Orders on Stallings' Request for Judicial Notice attached to her Demurrer to Signorini's Will Contest of the October 11, 2001 Will and attached to the Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings on Signorini's Petition for Probate of Decedent's March 10, 2007 Will. 1. Register of Actions: The Court takes judicial notice of the listings contained in the Register of Actions in In re Conservatorship of Irene Atacheff, Case No. PCN-08-290840. 2. Order After Hearing Restraining Elder or Dependent Adult Abuse, filed July 8, 2009, Case No. PCN-08-290840: The Court takes judicial notice of the Order. 3. Petition for Dissolution of Marriage, filed July 28, 2009, Case No. FDI-09-770278. The Court takes judicial notice of the Petition. 4. Proof of Service of Summons, filed August 14, 2009, Case No. FDI-09-770278: The Court takes judicial notice of the filing of the Proof of S
